---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact | DeepFlows"
description: "How to contact DeepFlows. Questions about article content, corrections, collaboration and consulting enquiries, writing and speaking requests, press and advertising enquiries."
number-sections: false
toc: false
lang: en
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ja" href="https://deepflows.net/contact" />
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://deepflows.net/contact-en" />
---

Thank you for visiting DeepFlows.\
For any enquiry about this site, please write to the address below.

## Get in touch

📧 **[heejun1105\@gmail.com](mailto:heejun1105@gmail.com)**

Including "DeepFlows" in the subject line helps ensure your message is seen.

## What I am happy to hear about

- **Questions about article content** (groundwater modeling, PHREEQC, MODFLOW, Python, and so on)
- **Corrections and reports of errors** — these are genuinely welcome, and I will verify and correct promptly
- **Research collaboration and technical consulting**
- **Writing, speaking and review requests**
- **Press enquiries and advertising enquiries**

## About replies

I read every message and normally reply within a week.\
Please understand that I may not reply in the following cases:

- Messages unrelated to the site's content, or unsolicited sales enquiries
- Requests to perform detailed analyses, assignments or reports on your behalf
- Questions that cannot be answered from publicly available information alone

## About the author

**Heejun Yang, Ph.D.**\
A researcher specializing in groundwater flow analysis, geochemical modeling and hydrology, with 26 peer-reviewed publications.

For a full profile and publication list, see [About](/about-en.html).\
Personal data is handled as described in the [Privacy Policy](/privacy-en.html).
